summary: Iteration 112: Verified all requested features. Backend API correctly returns plate_number and vehicle_images for travel routes. Hotel API returns location coordinates and 9 policies. travel.py cleaned - only has management/analytics endpoints. HotelsResults.jsx has compact h-9 controls. HotelDetails.jsx has map and nearby service filters working. Cloudflare rate-limiting caused intermittent blank screenshots during UI testing.

minor.issue: City name matching is case-sensitive with accents - 'Yaounde' returns 0 routes but 'Yaoundé' returns 3 routes. Frontend falls back to mock data when no routes found.

integration_issues.issue: When API returns 0 routes (due to city name mismatch), frontend shows mock data without plate_number/vehicle_images. Real routes with plate numbers only show when exact city name matches (e.g., 'Yaoundé' not 'Yaounde').

action_items: OPTIONAL: Improve city name matching in backend to handle accented characters (e.g., 'Yaounde' should match 'Yaoundé')
critical_code_review_comments: travel_routes.py: Lines 90-103 correctly enrich routes with plate_number, vehicle_images (max 2), vehicle_name from vehicles collection
travel.py: CLEANED - only has /routes/management, /management/my-routes, /analytics/dashboard (no duplicate public routes)
TravelResults.jsx: Lines 183-187 plate_number Badge with data-testid='plate-number-{tripId}' - CORRECT
TravelResults.jsx: Lines 63-87 VehicleImageThumbnails limits to 2 images with data-testid='bus-thumbnail-{idx}' - CORRECT
HotelsResults.jsx: Lines 839, 854, 863, 875 use h-9 for compact controls (Sort, Grid/List, Filters) - CORRECT
HotelDetails.jsx: Lines 558-600 nearby pins generation with deterministic positioning - VERIFIED
HotelDetails.jsx: Policies section shows check-in/check-out + Additional Policies toggle - VERIFIED
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified. Backend API returns plate_number and vehicle_images correctly. The only issue is city name matching - 'Yaounde' vs 'Yaoundé'. When exact match fails, frontend shows mock data. Cloudflare rate-limiting may cause blank screenshots during automated testing.

travel_api_plate_number.details: GET /api/travel/routes returns plate_number per route (e.g., 'LT 957 A', 'LT 882 A')

travel_api_vehicle_images.details: GET /api/travel/routes returns vehicle_images (2 images per route)

travel_frontend_plate_badge.details: TravelResults.jsx lines 183-187 show plate_number as Badge with data-testid

travel_frontend_thumbnails.details: VehicleImageThumbnails component (lines 63-87) shows max 2 images with data-testid

travel_duplicate_routes_resolved.details: travel.py only has management/analytics endpoints. travel_routes.py has public CRUD routes.

hotel_results_compact_controls.details: HotelsResults.jsx uses h-9 for Sort dropdown, Grid/List toggle, Filters button (lines 839, 854, 863, 875)

hotel_details_map.details: Leaflet map visible in 'Explore the area' section. Hotel has location: {lat: 4.0428, lon: 9.6929}

hotel_details_nearby_filters.details: 4 filter buttons: Restaurants, Car Rentals, Cinemas, Events with data-testid='filter-{key}'

hotel_details_policies.details: Hotel has 9 policies including Check-in: 14:00, Check-out: 12:00, and 7 additional policies

notes: Cloudflare rate-limiting caused intermittent blank screenshots. All features verified through API testing and code review. The plate_number and vehicle_images display correctly when real routes are returned by the API.
